evidence: APS has developed an AI strategy to responsibly utilize AI to advance our business strategy, enhance customer and employee experiences, and optimize operational reliability.
In 2024, APS began installing a system of artificial intelligence-based fire sensing cameras with the ability to detect and alert on fire ignitions.
implementing automation technologies to enhance efficiencies and increase data-oriented decision making

In 2024, APS began installing a system of artificial intelligence-based fire sensing cameras with the ability to detect and alert on fire ignitions. These alerts are sent both to APS and fire response dispatch centers.
APS has developed an AI strategy... At the core of our AI strategy is a robust governance model that develops guidance, policies, and relevant sub-strategies for the execution of AI projects.

if APS fails to strategically implement artificial intelligence, it could miss the opportunity for cost savings, face increasing costs on legacy systems, insufficiently integrate internal and external data sets

APS s strategy, including the timing of such strategy, in adopting new technologies, such as artificial intelligence, could also adversely impact APS s business... risk misusing artificial intelligence, impact employee satisfaction
